patch.value: Upgrade only the action generation; preserve permissions and both the upstream Gitleaks scan and repository history scan. Close only after the merged master job is green without the deprecation annotation.
Upgrade Gitleaks action to Node 24 generation
Replace gitleaks/gitleaks-action@v2 after merged-head security workflow emitted the GitHub runner Node 20 deprecation warning.
Security workflow uses Gitleaks action v3; secret scan and repository history scan pass; merged master run has no Gitleaks Node 20 deprecation warning
Merged-head run 29519584624 identifies the exact action and upstream v3 release is confirmed.
Keep secret scanning on a supported action runtime
Avoid future workflow breakage when GitHub stops forcing Node 20 actions onto Node 24
Clean secret-scan job on the current Gitleaks action generation
Master security run reports gitleaks/gitleaks-action@v2 as deprecated

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Discovered after #50 merged: Security run 29519584624 warned that gitleaks/gitleaks-action@v2 targets deprecated Node 20.

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Upstream latest release is v3.0.0, published 2026-05-30; preserve the existing least-privilege permissions and scan steps.

value.author: codex-root
value.text: A green workflow can still contain a future-breaking runtime deprecation; merged-head annotations are part of completion evidence.

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Upstream release evidence: https://github.com/gitleaks/gitleaks-action/releases/tag/v3.0.0; tag v3 resolves to e0c47f4f8be36e29cdc102c57e68cb5cbf0e8d1e.

author: codex-root

value.author: codex-root
value.text: PR #54 review recommended an immutable security-action reference. Updated Gitleaks to commit e0c47f4f8be36e29cdc102c57e68cb5cbf0e8d1e with v3.0.0 annotation instead of floating v3.

message: Record and address immutable action pin review
